/usr/bin/ar qc libai_safety_modbus_manager.a  CMakeFiles/ai_safety_modbus_manager.dir/src/bridge/shared_memory_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_safety_modbus_manager.dir/src/common/modbus_control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_safety_modbus_manager.dir/src/config/modbus_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_safety_modbus_manager.dir/src/devices/hookWarning.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_safety_modbus_manager.dir/src/devices/multi_turn_encoder_rtu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_safety_modbus_manager.dir/src/devices/trolleyControl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ai_safety_modbus_manager.dir/src/manager/manager_client.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libai_safety_modbus_manager.a
